'''鈭歳-dh-m-n''' ('''karadhmenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chammy|chammy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chammy|chammy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-dh-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| karadhmenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiradhmenoko|thiradhmenoko]] || [[word:jiradhmenoko|jiradhmenoko]] || [[word:shiradhmenoko|shiradhmenoko]] || [[word:kiradhmenoko|kiradhmenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙radhmenoko|th忙radhmenoko]] || [[word:j忙radhmenoko|j忙radhmenoko]] || [[word:sh忙radhmenoko|sh忙radhmenoko]] || [[word:k忙radhmenoko|k忙radhmenoko]]
|-

| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharadhmenoko|tharadhmenoko]] || [[word:jaradhmenoko|jaradhmenoko]] || [[word:sharadhmenoko|sharadhmenoko]] || [[word:karadhmenoko|karadhmenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
